refnamediv.refpurpose: Sets the SRID of a raster to a particular integer srid defined in the spatial_ref_sys table.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Sets the SRID on a raster to a particular integer value.

note.para: This function does not transform the raster in any way - it simply sets meta data defining the spatial ref of the coordinate reference system that it's currently in. Useful for transformations later.
